arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes wins Premier League player of the month award as he matches achievement of two former Man United stars
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has been named the Premier League player of the month for March. It is the fifth time that Fernandes has won the award but his first in nearly five years.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne Primed for MLS Move After Man City Exit
arts.sum: MLS, Saudi Arabia and potential moves to Turkey or Germany headline options for the Manchester City star.

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven fires three-word Man United injury update before derby clash vs Man City
arts.sum: Manchester United will hope to have Ayden Heaven back sometime soon - as Ruben Amorim looks to get the Reds back into form for a vital stretch of the season.

arts.ttl: 'I'm addicted' Josko Gvardiol loves his surprising new Man City nickname in season of change
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Josko Gvardiol speaks to the Manchester Evening News about a difficult season at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Fernandes to be sacrificed as Man Utd prepare €100m Real Madrid offer
arts.sum: Man Utd’s reported interest in Valverde follows speculation that Real Madrid will pursue a €106m (£90m) move for Red Devils captain Bruno Fernandes this summer. Fernandes has two years remaining on his current Man Utd contract and Ruben Amorim has insisted that he has no intention of allowing the Portugal star to depart during the 2025 summer transfer window .

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney urged to quit management by former Manchester United team-mate in savage dig after his disastrous spells at Birmingham and Plymouth
arts.sum: The Frenchman joked that he has told the Englishman to give up on his dream of coaching and cited his recent disastrous spell with Birmingham City .

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer return clause truth after Man City transfer and Kevin De Bruyne exit
arts.sum: Chelsea star Cole Palmer has been linked with a move away from Stamford Bridge - and rumours of a return to Manchester City may increase after Kevin De Bruyne departs.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne showed true colours after being asked if he would sign for Liverpool
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne has announced that he will leave Manchester City at the end of the season after a dominant Premier League reign, albeit one different to that he imagined as a child

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne was the magician who brought personality to the Man City machine
arts.sum: If the accusation levelled at Pep Guardiola is that his teams can be too bloodless, beating opponents with perfectly-constructed moves of precise passing, De Bruyne was a throwback

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester City line up bid for De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in a deal to sign Nottingham Forest midfielder Morgan Gibbs-White this summer. Pep Guardiola is set to overhaul his midfield options and has placed Gibbs-White on the club’s shortlist of options. Kevin De Bruyne announced on Friday that he will be leaving Manchester City in the summer after a decade at […] The post Exclusive: Manchester City line up bid for De Bruyne replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.
